reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atencion. La señora de rulos de la caja es una irrespetuosa. La verdad es que perdieron un cliente. Todas las semanas cargaba nafta y hacia los cambios de aceite. Nunca mas voy a ir.

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster. The curly-haired lady at the register was disrespectful. They've really lost a customer. I used to get gas and oil changes every week. I'll never go back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURhOXR2TDNnRRAB
